title: Error when trying to upload images
description: When I try to upload an image, it fails with an error message saying 'Failed to upload file'. The issue has been happening every time since the last update.

title: Login Issues
description: I've been having trouble logging in for the past hour. Every time I enter my credentials, the system says my password is incorrect, but I'm certain it's correct.

title: Crash on startup
description: The software crashes as soon as I try to start it up. It happens every time, and I have to force quit and reinstall.

title: Incorrect data entry
description: I've noticed that the data entry feature is not working correctly. Sometimes it doesn't recognize the input I'm typing, or it enters incorrect information.

title: Error when trying to create new project
description: When I try to create a new project, I get an error message saying 'Project already exists'. However, I know for certain that this is my first project in the software.

title: Feature not working as expected
description: I'm having trouble with the feature that's supposed to automate tasks. It's not working at all, and I've tried restarting the software multiple times without any success.

title: System crash after 5 minutes of inactivity
description: The system crashes every 5 minutes, even if I'm actively using it. This is really frustrating and needs to be fixed ASAP.

title: Upload limit reached
description: I'm getting an error message saying that the upload limit has been reached. However, I know I haven't uploaded anything close to this limit yet.

title: Error when trying to export data
description: When I try to export my data, it fails with an error message saying 'Data not found'. This is really inconvenient since I need access to my data regularly.

title: Software freezes on certain pages
description: The software freezes every time I try to access the 'Settings' page. It happens even after a full reboot, which is really frustrating.

title: Data entry issues with specific symbols
description: I'm having trouble entering certain characters (like accents or special symbols) into the data entry field. The software doesn't recognize them correctly.

title: Error when trying to delete project
description: When I try to delete a project, I get an error message saying 'Project not found'. However, I know for certain that this is my project.

title: Crash on exit
description: The software crashes every time I try to close it. This happens even after a full reboot of the computer.

title: Feature not working with specific data
description: I'm having trouble using the feature that's supposed to analyze my data. It doesn't work correctly with certain types of data, like dates or times.

title: System crashes when trying to open certain files
description: The system crashes every time I try to open a specific type of file (like Excel documents). This is really inconvenient since I need access to those files regularly.

title: Error message doesn't make sense
description: When I get an error message, it usually says something like 'Unknown error' or 'Internal server error'. It's really confusing and doesn't provide any helpful information about what went wrong.

title: Feature not working with multiple users
description: I'm having trouble using the feature that's supposed to collaborate with multiple users. It only works correctly when there's only one user logged in.

title: Software crashes on certain hardware configurations
description: The software crashes every time I try to run it on a specific type of hardware (like an older laptop). This is really frustrating since I need access to the software regularly.

title: Data entry issues with formatting
description: I'm having trouble entering data into certain fields because of formatting issues. The software doesn't recognize certain types of formatting, like tabs or line breaks.

title: Error when trying to backup data
description: When I try to backup my data, it fails with an error message saying 'Data not found'. This is really inconvenient since I need access to my data regularly.

title: Feature not working with certain plugins
description: I'm having trouble using the feature that's supposed to integrate with certain plugins. It doesn't work correctly with those plugins, even though they're installed and updated correctly.

title: System crashes when trying to access certain web pages
description: The system crashes every time I try to access a specific type of web page (like a website with JavaScript). This is really frustrating since I need access to those websites regularly.

title: Data entry issues with keyboard shortcuts
description: I'm having trouble using certain keyboard shortcuts in the data entry field. The software doesn't recognize them correctly, even though they're standard shortcuts for most applications.

title: Error when trying to import data
description: When I try to import my data from another program, it fails with an error message saying 'Data format not supported'. This is really inconvenient since I need access to my data regularly.

title: Feature not working with large datasets
description: I'm having trouble using the feature that's supposed to analyze large datasets. It doesn't work correctly with those types of datasets, even though they're in a standard format.

title: System crashes when trying to open certain files with specific extensions
description: The system crashes every time I try to open a file with a specific extension (like .docx). This is really inconvenient since I need access to those files regularly.

title: Error message doesn't provide any helpful information
description: When I get an error message, it usually just says 'An error has occurred' or something similar. It doesn't provide any helpful information about what went wrong or how to fix the issue.

title: Feature not working with specific browser versions
description: I'm having trouble using the feature that's supposed to work seamlessly across different browsers. It only works correctly in certain browser versions, even though they're relatively modern.

title: Software crashes on startup when trying to access certain modules
description: The software crashes every time I try to start it up and access a specific module (like the 'Reports' page). This is really frustrating since I need access to those features regularly.

title: Data entry issues with formatting in specific fields
description: I'm having trouble entering data into certain fields because of formatting issues. The software doesn't recognize certain types of formatting, like line breaks or tabs, in those fields.

title: Error when trying to delete a project
description: When I try to delete a project, I get an error message saying 'Project not found'. This is really inconvenient since I need access to my data regularly.

title: Feature not working with certain operating systems
description: I'm having trouble using the feature that's supposed to work seamlessly across different operating systems. It only works correctly in certain OS versions, even though they're relatively modern.

title: Auto-Complete Feature for Search Bar
description: I'd like to suggest an auto-complete feature in our search bar, similar to what Google uses.

title: Integration with Third-Party CRM
description: We're using a third-party CRM and would love to see integration with your platform to sync customer data.

title: Mobile App Notification System
description: It would be great to have a customizable notification system for our mobile app, similar to what iOS offers.

title: Data Export Feature
description: We need to export large datasets regularly and would appreciate the ability to do so in bulk.

title: Voice Assistant Integration
description: Would it be possible to integrate our platform with popular voice assistants like Alexa or Google Assistant?

title: Error Reporting for API Calls
description: We'd love to see improved error reporting for our API calls, including more detailed error messages.

title: Customizable Dashboards
description: I'd like to request the ability to create custom dashboards with different layouts and widgets.

title: Import/Export CSV Feature
description: It would be helpful to have a feature that allows users to import and export data in CSV format.

title: Push Notifications for Mobile App
description: We'd like to see push notifications implemented for our mobile app, similar to what Android offers.

title: Data Visualization Tool
description: I'd love to suggest the integration of a data visualization tool within our platform.

title: API Key Management
description: We need more control over API keys, such as the ability to create custom key pairs and revoke existing ones.

title: Customizable Email Templates
description: I'd like to request the ability to create custom email templates with different layouts and designs.

title: User Role Management
description: We need more advanced user role management, including fine-grained access control and permission management.

title: Integration with Google Drive
description: It would be great to see integration with Google Drive, allowing users to upload files directly to our platform.

title: Customizable Search Filters
description: I'd like to request the ability to create custom search filters for our data, including advanced filtering and grouping options.

title: Notification System for New Data Uploads
description: We need a notification system that alerts users when new data is uploaded to our platform.

title: Export CSV with Custom Fields
description: I'd love to see the ability to export CSV files with custom fields, including the ability to sort and filter by specific fields.

title: Integration with Salesforce
description: We're currently using Salesforce and would like to integrate our platform with it for seamless data sharing.

title: Data Validation and Cleaning
description: I'd like to request the ability to validate and clean data within our platform, including automated error checking and correction.

title: Customizable Widget Layouts
description: We need more flexibility in terms of widget layouts, including the ability to create custom designs and arrangements.

title: Integration with Amazon Web Services (AWS)
description: It would be great to see integration with AWS, allowing users to upload files directly to our platform and manage data in the cloud.

title: Error Reporting for Complex Queries
description: We'd love to see improved error reporting for complex queries, including more detailed error messages and suggestions for improvement.

title: Mobile App Support for Large Files
description: I'd like to request the ability to upload large files directly from our mobile app, without having to wait for a desktop connection.

title: Customizable Report Filters
description: We need more flexibility in terms of report filters, including the ability to create custom filters and groupings.

title: Integration with Microsoft Azure
description: It would be great to see integration with Microsoft Azure, allowing users to upload files directly to our platform and manage data in the cloud.

title: Data Analysis Tool
description: I'd love to suggest the integration of a data analysis tool within our platform, including advanced statistical and machine learning capabilities.

title: Notification System for Data Updates
description: We need a notification system that alerts users when data is updated or changed within our platform.

title: Customizable User Interface
description: I'd like to request the ability to create custom user interfaces with different layouts, designs, and themes.

title: Refund Request for Cancelled Order #1234

title: Order Cancellation Request
description: I was trying to cancel my order but it says I need to login to my account, which is incorrect. I did not change any password.

title: Issue with Recent Purchase
description: The product I received is damaged and the seller does not want to replace it. It has been two days since I made the purchase and this issue still hasn't been resolved.

title: Refund for Incorrect Order
description: I ordered a wrong item and they refused to give me a refund. The order was confirmed by them but when I asked for a return, they said it was too late.

title: Problem with Payment Method
description: The payment method I used is not recognized by the system. I tried using different cards and no option to change it was available in my account.

title: Missing Tracking Information
description: I did not receive any tracking information for my package even though it says it has shipped out. This is causing me a lot of inconvenience.

title: Refund Issue with Past Order
description: I tried to initiate a refund but the system keeps showing that I need to pay again. It was an error and not my fault.

title: Problem with Return Shipping
description: The shipping label for returning the item is not being sent to me. This is making it difficult for me to return the product.

title: Wrong Product Received

title: Account Lockout Issue

title: Difficulty in Cancelling Subscription
description: I tried to cancel my subscription but the system keeps sending me reminders and notifications that I'm a subscriber and it says I need to confirm cancellation. This is frustrating and causing me inconvenience.

description: The payment processing failed due to an error in the system. This happened during checkout, but no option was available to complete the transaction.

title: Missing Order Confirmation

title: Product Issue with Usage

title: Difficulty in Reaching Customer Support
description: I tried calling the customer support number and no one answered. The automated system kept repeating that all lines are busy and I couldn't get any assistance.

title: Order Shipment Delayed

title: Incorrect Order Total

title: Refund for Incorrect Item

title: Problem with Product Labeling
description: The product label says one thing, but the actual contents are different. This is causing me confusion and inconvenience.

title: Order Cancellation Failure

title: Difficulty in Returning Item
description: I tried to return the item but the system keeps sending me reminders and notifications that I need to confirm return. This is causing a lot of frustration.

title: Product Issue with Material

title: Error with Payment Method on Website

title: Missing Return Label

title: Product Not as Described

title: Difficulty in Upgrading Plan

title: Refund Delayed
description: The refund for my order has been delayed due to an internal issue in the system. The delay is causing a lot of frustration.

title: Product Feedback: Suggesting a New Feature
description: I've been using your software for the past six months and I love it. However, I think there's an opportunity to enhance the user experience by adding a feature that allows users to prioritize tasks based on deadlines. This would make our team more efficient and productive.

title: Issue with Order Confirmation
description: I placed an order last week but the confirmation email didn't include my name as requested. I understand it's not a critical issue, but it would be great if you could consider adding this feature in the future.

title: Feedback on User Interface
description: Your software is user-friendly and intuitive. However, I think the layout of certain sections could be improved for better readability. Perhaps consider adjusting the font size or color scheme to make it more visually appealing.

title: Error with Downloading Files
description: I've been experiencing issues with downloading files from your software. The download process is slow and often crashes. I'd appreciate it if you could look into this issue as soon as possible.

title: Suggestion for New Feature: Integration with Other Tools
description: Your software has become an essential tool in our workflow, but I think there's an opportunity to integrate it with other popular tools like Slack or Trello. This would make our workflow more seamless and efficient.

title: Incorrect Pricing Information
description: I recently upgraded my subscription plan, but the price I was charged was incorrect. I understand that mistakes can happen, but it's essential to double-check pricing information in the future.

title: Feedback on Customer Support Team
description: Your customer support team is very responsive and helpful. However, there are times when they don't respond immediately, which can be frustrating for customers like me who need assistance urgently.

title: Issue with Customization Options
description: I've been using your software for a while now, but I think the customization options could be improved. It would be great if you could provide more flexibility in terms of layout and design.

title: Suggestion for New Feature: AI-Powered Insights
description: Your software has become incredibly useful for our business, but I think there's an opportunity to integrate AI-powered insights that can help us make data-driven decisions. This would be a game-changer for our industry.

title: Error with Login Credentials
description: I've been experiencing issues with logging into your software. The login credentials weren't working, and I had to reset them multiple times before it finally worked. This was frustrating and time-consuming.

title: Feedback on User Experience
description: Your software is very user-friendly, but there are times when the interface feels a bit cluttered. Perhaps consider simplifying the layout or providing more visual cues to guide users through the process.

title: Suggestion for New Feature: Automated Reporting
description: Your software has become an essential tool in our workflow, but I think there's an opportunity to integrate automated reporting features. This would save us a significant amount of time and effort.

title: Issue with Data Export
description: I've been experiencing issues with exporting data from your software. The process is slow and often fails. I'd appreciate it if you could look into this issue as soon as possible.

title: Feedback on Customer Success Team
description: Your customer success team has been very helpful in getting us started with your software. However, there's a lack of communication around new features and updates, which can be confusing for some users.

title: Suggestion for New Feature: Integration with Other Companies' Tools
description: Your software has become an essential tool in our workflow, but I think there's an opportunity to integrate it with other companies' tools like Salesforce or HubSpot. This would make our workflow more seamless and efficient.

title: Error with Upload Files
description: I've been experiencing issues with uploading files to your software. The upload process is slow, and sometimes the file doesn't get uploaded at all. I'd appreciate it if you could look into this issue as soon as possible.

title: Feedback on User Interface
description: Your software has a great user interface, but there's one feature that I think is missing: a 'reset' button for the dashboard. It would be convenient to have a quick way to reset the layout.

title: Suggestion for New Feature: Predictive Analytics
description: Your software has become incredibly useful for our business, but I think there's an opportunity to integrate predictive analytics features that can help us make data-driven decisions. This would be a game-changer for our industry.

title: Issue with Customer Support
description: I've been experiencing issues with getting help from your customer support team. The response time is slow, and sometimes the issue isn't resolved immediately.

title: Feedback on User Experience
description: Your software is very user-friendly, but there's one feature that I think needs improvement: the navigation menu. It would be great if you could simplify the layout or provide more visual cues to guide users through the process.

title: Suggestion for New Feature: Integration with Calendar Tools
description: Your software has become an essential tool in our workflow, but I think there's an opportunity to integrate it with calendar tools like Google Calendar or Microsoft Outlook. This would make our workflow more seamless and efficient.

title: Error with Logging Out
description: I've been experiencing issues with logging out of your software. The logout process is slow, and sometimes I'm still logged in after I thought I had logged out.

title: Feedback on Product Documentation
description: Your product documentation is very comprehensive, but there are times when the explanations could be more detailed or clearer. Perhaps consider providing additional resources or tutorials to help users get started.

title: Suggestion for New Feature: Automated Tasks
description: Your software has become incredibly useful for our business, but I think there's an opportunity to integrate automated tasks that can help us save time and effort. This would be a game-changer for our industry.

title: Issue with User Permissions
description: I've been experiencing issues with user permissions in your software. The settings are not being applied correctly, and I'm having trouble managing users and roles.

title: Feedback on Customer Retention Strategy
description: Your customer retention strategy is very effective, but there's a lack of transparency around how you acquire new customers. Perhaps consider providing more information about your marketing efforts?
